caption: The video features a promotional segment for a 2020-21 Panini Obsidian Basketball FOTL (First Off The Line) 1-Box Break, specifically Break #5 with a random division. The left side of the screen displays an image of a basketball card featuring Stephen Curry of the Golden State Warriors, along with details about the product, including its price ($99.99), the number of spots left (6), and the contents of each box, which include two autographs and two inserts or parallels. The right side shows a man speaking to the camera, likely explaining the offer and encouraging viewers to subscribe to the channel. He gestures with his hand as he speaks, adding emphasis to his words. The overall setting appears to be a store or a room filled with collectibles, suggesting a focus on sports memorabilia and trading cards.
